ideas.title: Shift in AI Constraints from Chips to Firm Power
ideas.why_it_might_matter: Understanding the shift from chip availability to power constraints can help stakeholders better align their investments and strategies in AI infrastructure.
ideas.actual_problem: The need to secure reliable and sufficient power sources for AI operations, rather than just acquiring more chips.
ideas.hidden_variable: The actual constraint has shifted to the availability of firm, dispatchable power.

ideas.title: Adapting Publishing Strategies in the Age of AI Search
ideas.why_it_might_matter: Understanding this shift can help publishers adapt their strategies to thrive in a landscape where traditional SEO tactics are less effective.
ideas.actual_problem: The distribution model is shifting from clicks driven by rankings to citations within answer engines, necessitating a new strategy focused on brand and owned audience.
ideas.hidden_variable: The click itself is being removed by the answer layer, not the rankings.

ideas.title: Impact of Fully Autonomous Vehicles on Accident Economy
ideas.why_it_might_matter: Understanding the accident-dependent economy's complexities could lead to innovative solutions and policies that address the societal impacts of autonomous vehicles.
ideas.actual_problem: The challenge of understanding and managing the economic and social ramifications of removing the accident substrate.
ideas.hidden_variable: The interconnected web of industries and services that rely on the accident economy.

ideas.title: AI-Native SaaS Challengers for Legacy Systems
ideas.why_it_might_matter: This opportunity leverages AI advancements to disrupt established markets, potentially leading to significant cost savings and efficiency gains.
ideas.actual_problem: There is a need for innovative, AI-native software solutions that can compete with entrenched legacy systems.
ideas.hidden_variable: The rapid advancement of AI technologies allows for the creation of more efficient and cost-effective alternatives.

ideas.title: AI-Driven Closed Discovery Loops for Science
ideas.why_it_might_matter: Harnessing AI for closed-loop discovery could significantly accelerate scientific breakthroughs and innovation across multiple fields.
ideas.actual_problem: How to effectively harness AI to automate and optimize the entire scientific discovery process.
ideas.hidden_variable: The ability of AI to integrate various stages of the scientific process into a single loop.

ideas.title: Rebuilding Software for AI Agents
ideas.why_it_might_matter: As AI agents become more common, optimizing software for their use could unlock significant efficiencies and new business models.
ideas.actual_problem: Existing software systems are not optimized for AI agents, leading to inefficiencies and missed opportunities in automation.
ideas.hidden_variable: The rapid advancement and adoption of AI technologies that can operate autonomously.

ideas.title: Understanding Speech Control in Text-to-Speech Systems
ideas.why_it_might_matter: This research could significantly enhance the controllability and expressiveness of TTS systems, leading to more natural and user-friendly applications.
ideas.actual_problem: The lack of understanding of how specific language instructions affect the acoustic output of TTS systems, hindering their controllability and effectiveness.
ideas.hidden_variable: The complexity of how different tokens (style vs. content) interact within the model's architecture.

ideas.title: Improving Task State Management for Tool-Calling Agents
ideas.why_it_might_matter: Improving task state management could significantly enhance the reliability of AI agents in customer service, leading to better user experiences.
ideas.actual_problem: Ineffective state management in tool-calling agents results in errors and policy violations.
ideas.hidden_variable: The lack of a structured method to maintain and reference task states during interactions.

ideas.title: AI-Driven Meeting Recordings to Dynamic Team Wiki
ideas.why_it_might_matter: This solution addresses a common pain point in team collaboration, enhancing efficiency and information retention.
ideas.actual_problem: Inefficient documentation processes lead to lost information and unclear action items.
ideas.hidden_variable: The variability in how teams document and follow up on meeting discussions.

ideas.title: Reducing Aggression in A&E Waiting Rooms
ideas.why_it_might_matter: Improving communication in waiting rooms can significantly reduce aggression and enhance patient satisfaction, leading to a safer environment for staff and patients alike.
ideas.actual_problem: The lack of clear communication and transparency regarding wait times and care processes leads to anxiety and perceived unfairness.
ideas.hidden_variable: Patients' sense of process, progress, and control during their wait.

ideas.title: Pre-Security Interventions to Reduce Liquid Violations
ideas.why_it_might_matter: Reducing the number of oversized liquid containers at security can streamline the screening process and enhance passenger experience.
ideas.actual_problem: Passengers forget or misunderstand liquid container size rules prior to arriving at security.
ideas.hidden_variable: Timing of compliance needs to occur before reaching the security screening.

ideas.title: Opportunities in AI-Native Service Companies
ideas.why_it_might_matter: The shift towards AI-native service companies could revolutionize traditional service industries, offering significant efficiency gains and cost reductions.
ideas.actual_problem: The need for innovative service delivery models that leverage AI to improve efficiency and reduce costs in traditional service sectors.
ideas.hidden_variable: The increasing demand for efficiency and specialization in service delivery across various industries.

ideas.title: Automating Knowledge Management for AI Integration
ideas.why_it_might_matter: As AI continues to evolve, the ability to harness and structure domain knowledge will be crucial for effective automation and decision-making.
ideas.actual_problem: The lack of a centralized, structured knowledge management system that can be easily accessed and updated.
ideas.hidden_variable: The complexity and variability of domain knowledge across different teams and formats.

ideas.title: Comparative Hallucination Rates of AI Models
ideas.why_it_might_matter: This insight could lead to improved AI model development by highlighting the importance of hallucination rates.
ideas.actual_problem: Understanding and mitigating hallucinations in AI models to improve reliability.
ideas.hidden_variable: The definition and measurement of 'hallucination' in AI models may vary.

ideas.title: Discovering Colors Beyond Screen Limitations
ideas.why_it_might_matter: Understanding and accessing a broader color spectrum can enhance creative projects and improve design outcomes.
ideas.actual_problem: Users need access to a broader color palette for design and artistic purposes beyond digital displays.
ideas.hidden_variable: The existence of color spaces and physical mediums that can represent a wider range of colors.

ideas.title: Innovative CSS Framework for Responsive Design
ideas.why_it_might_matter: As web development evolves, a new CSS framework could significantly streamline the process of creating responsive designs, making it easier for developers.
ideas.actual_problem: The need for a more efficient and flexible CSS framework that simplifies responsive design.
ideas.hidden_variable: The increasing diversity of devices and screen resolutions that web applications must support.

ideas.title: Innovative Data Storage Using Favicons
ideas.why_it_might_matter: This approach could revolutionize how we think about data storage and retrieval in web development.
ideas.actual_problem: How to utilize unconventional storage methods for data in a compact form.
ideas.hidden_variable: The capacity of favicons to hold more data than traditionally perceived.

ideas.title: Enhancing Community Connection Through Town Square
ideas.why_it_might_matter: Fostering community connection can lead to improved mental health and social cohesion, addressing a growing need in modern society.
ideas.actual_problem: Communities lack physical spaces that foster genuine social interaction and connection.
ideas.hidden_variable: The rise of digital communication has led to a decline in face-to-face interactions.

recipes.mcp: github (a GitHub MCP exists; would lift rate limits + give richer metadata)
producthunt (official API needs OAuth; an MCP would simplify auth)
curl_cffi (cheap stealth GET) — else a Reddit MCP/OAuth app
grok-cli (native X access) — else x/twitter MCP or browser-use
gemini-cli (native YT access; flat-rate) or YouTube Data API key
